name: Acerola
summary: It is best framed as a vitamin-C-rich fruit botanical with food/supplement relevance.
description: It is best framed as a vitamin-C-rich fruit botanical with food/supplement relevance.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: G6PD deficiency caution with very high vitamin C dosing
interactions: May affect iron absorption and some lab results at high vitamin C intakes.
